# Veep

> Veep places vetted senior operators inside founder-led companies to own the work that can't wait. Matched in 72 hours. Deployed in under 10 days. 30-day fit guarantee.

Veep offers four engagement models — Advisory, Sprint, Operator, and Pod — plus an Executive Roster for PE firms, family offices, and multi-company founders. Operators include CFOs, COOs, CROs, CMOs, CTOs, CPOs, chiefs of staff, and functional experts.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Veep's senior operator model, how it works, and proof.
- [About](/about): The founders behind Veep and the operating principles that shape every engagement.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Advisory, Sprint, Operator, and Pod pricing with the 30-day fit guarantee.
- [FAQ](/faq): Straight answers on cost, timing, operator vetting, and fit.
- [For Portfolios](/for-portfolios): Executive Roster for PE firms, family offices, holdcos, and multi-company founders.
- [Meet Veep](/meetveep): Book an intro call with a Veep founder.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the Veep team.
- [Join](/join): Apply to join the Veep operator roster.
